full_text:
Yang Ji 楊濟
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Ji (楊濟). Champion General under Jin. Controlled the field armies during the invasion of Wu. Yang Ji was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Yang Ji lived during the Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
